'''Inadi''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] officer who served in the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Forces]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] and the [[Black Fleet Crisis]]. Having attained the rank of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]], she was the commander of the [[Warrior-class gunship|''Warrior''-class gunship]] [[Vanguard (Warrior-class)|''Vanguard'']] when the [[Warship/Legends|warship]] participated in the [[Battle of ILC-905]]. She was [[Death/Legends|killed]] when ''Vanguard'' was destroyed by the [[Yevetha]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1st}}
